query:
INSERT INTO job_detection_log
            (
                type_id,
                job_id,
                project_id,
                result
            )
            SELECT * FROM UNNEST(
                $1::INTEGER[],
                $2::INTEGER[],
                $3::UUID[],
                $4::VARCHAR[]
            )
            ON CONFLICT (job_id)
            DO UPDATE SET
                result = EXCLUDED.result
